key_requirements: init_change routes to restructure_input after creation — skip target is post_clarifications_created
Phase transitions: ChangeInited → InputRestructured → PreClarificationsCreated → ReferenceContext*
Structured issues skip directly from ChangeInited to post_clarifications_created phase
init_change must replicate group creation when skipping this phase
init_change writes this with Key Decisions from structured issue
Output: reference_context.md with spec table + spec_plan
